title: Purchasable Ingredient
description: A raw or pre-made ingredient that is purchased, not made in-house

parent.description: ID of a parent ingredient this is a variant of (e.g. SHIRO_MISO -> MISO)

production_type.description: Always 'purchasable' for items in this folder

type.description: Category of the ingredient (e.g. dairy, spice, oil, produce, nut, grain)

name.description: Display name. If omitted, derived from the id via title-casing

unit.description: Default unit of measure (e.g. gram, piece, whole, teaspoon, pinch)

sub_ingredients.description: IDs of constituent ingredients for labeling/allergen tracing

allergen.description: Whether this is a common allergen (FDA top 9)

conversions.description: Unit conversion factors for this ingredient

base_unit.description: The source unit to convert from

multiplier.description: Multiply by this factor to get the target unit
